speaker: speaker1
text: Do you remember what the ratings of movies stand for ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , G stands for General Audiences , PG means Parental Guidance suggested , R is restricted to audiences under 18 and X means explicit content .

speaker: speaker1
text: Does anyone pay any attention to those ratings anymore ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Remember when we were kids ? Theaters wouldn't let kids in to PG moves without a parent .

speaker: speaker1
text: I remember that I never saw an X moves even displayed .

speaker: speaker2
text: Now with video rentals it's all a personal matter .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yea , I never see theaters turn people away for their age anymore either .

speaker: speaker2
text: Now we have to make a choice about what we will see and what we won't .
